data.current_summary: Get a data record by ID
data.current_description: Retrieve a specific data record by its INSPIRE record ID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a specific data record (e.g., HEPData) by its INSPIRE record ID. Returns the complete data record object containing metadata, associated literature references, and dataset information. Use this operation when you need to access detailed information about a specific dataset in the INSPIRE repository.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important context about what type of data records are returned (HEPData), what fields/structure to expect, and when an AI agent should use this operation. Added clarification about the data record type, return structure, and use case guidance to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Search and list journal records with pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Search and retrieve journal records from the INSPIRE database. Supports filtering by query parameters and pagination. Returns a list of matching journal records with metadata including title, ISSN, and other journal information.

data.current_description: Upload a TeX document with \cite commands and generate a bibliography file in the specified format.
data.description_suggestion: Upload a TeX document containing \cite commands and generate a formatted bibliography file. Accepts TeX file upload and format parameter (e.g., BibTeX, HTML, JSON). Parses \cite commands to identify referenced literature in INSPIRE database and returns a bibliography file in the requested format. Does not modify the original TeX document.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about supported output formats, what happens to the input file, and how citations are resolved. Added information about format options, citation resolution process, and clarified that the original document is not modified to improve AI agent understanding of this operation's capabilities and limitations.

data.current_summary: Get a data record by ID
data.current_description: Retrieve a specific data record by its INSPIRE record ID.

Returns the complete data record object containing metadata, associated literature references, and dataset information. Use this operation when you need to access detailed information about a specific dataset in the INSPIRE repository.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important context about what type of data records are returned (HEPData), what fields/structure to expect, and when an AI agent should use this operation. Added clarification about the data record type, return structure, and use case guidance to improve AI agent interpretability.
